summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 PWA testing of SP630E RGBWW LED Controller. All 11 requested PWA features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Backend APIs confirmed working perfectly (10/10). PWA manifest.json, service worker, installation guide, demo mode, 5-channel sliders, protocol info display, and all UI components functioning correctly for iOS Bluefy browser support.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (GET /api/) - 100% working
Backend preset APIs (POST/GET/DELETE/PUT) - 100% working
Backend schedule APIs (POST/GET/DELETE/PUT) - 100% working
PWA manifest.json loads correctly from /manifest.json
Service worker registers successfully (confirmed via console logs)
Connection page displays Service UUID (0000ffe0-...-00805f9b34fb)
Connection page displays Write UUID (0000ffe1-...-00805f9b34fb)
Protocol tags display correctly (SP630E, RGBCCT, 5CH PWM)
Demo mode button works and enters control panel successfully
5 channel sliders functional with Turkish labels (KIRMIZI, YEŞİL, MAVİ, SICAK BEYAZ, SOĞUK BEYAZ)
Slider percentage display updates correctly (0%-100%)
Color preview area updates when sliders change
HEPSİ AÇ button sets all channels to 100%
HEPSİ KAPAT button sets all channels to 0%
KOMUTU GÖNDER button works in demo mode
Tab navigation works via icons (control, presets, schedule, animation, settings)
Preset save flow works (KAYDET button, form input, save functionality)
Preset load functionality working end-to-end
Animation panel shows multiple PWM effects (7 Renk, Nefes, Stroboskop, etc.)
Animation effect activation working in demo mode
Settings tab displays device info (SP630E Demo)
Settings tab shows BLE protocol UUIDs correctly
Installation guide 'Ana ekrana nasıl eklenir?' link exists and works
Multi-platform installation instructions displayed (iOS Bluefy, Android Chrome, Desktop Chrome)
PWA installation guide content comprehensive and accurate

success_percentage.pwa_features: 100% (manifest, service worker, installation guide all working)
